title: Luxury Booking Engine
description: A sophisticated hotel booking application developed with Python and Streamlit. Designed with a premium dark UI, it smoothly handles credit card validation, spa upgrades, and automated PDF ticket generation.

title: Horizon Weather
description: A responsive, async-driven weather application integrated with the Visual Crossing API. Built with modern JavaScript and Webpack, featuring geolocation support and a polished glassmorphism interface.

title: BattleShip
description: A fully playable, browser-based Battleship game built strictly with Object-Oriented JavaScript. It showcases drag-and-drop fleet placement, a randomized CPU opponent, and rigorous Jest testing.

title: Student Management System
description: A robust desktop application for student record management, developed using PyQt6 and MySQL. It provides seamless CRUD operations, live search filtering, and regex input validation in a custom dark GUI.

title: Thief Detection Notifier
description: An automated, real-time motion detection system engineered using Python and OpenCV. It efficiently buffers frames in RAM and utilizes background threading to instantly email intruder snapshots.

title: ODE Solver
description: A visual solver for Ordinary Differential Equations integrating SymPy for symbolic exact solutions and Plotly for frame-by-frame animations. It implements Euler, Heun, and RK4 numerical methods within a modern Streamlit interface.

title: NEXUS Admin Dashboard
description: A fully responsive admin dashboard mastering hybrid layout architecture. It combines the structural power of CSS Grid with Flexbox alignment, wrapped in a professional dark mode aesthetic with glassmorphism touches.

title: Glassy Tic-Tac-Toe
description: A classic strategy game reimagined with a vibrant glassmorphism UI. Built entirely with Vanilla JavaScript, it utilizes the Module Pattern and Factory Functions to ensure a clean, decoupled architecture.

title: Glassmorphic Todo List
description: A sleek task management application featuring a frosted glass aesthetic and local storage persistence. Developed using OOP principles and bundled with Webpack for modern ES6 module management.

title: Midnight Library
description: An atmosphere-focused book tracking application featuring an immersive dark mode and native HTML5 modals. Engineered with Object-Oriented JavaScript and real-time form validation via the Constraint Validation API.

title: Midnight Lounge
description: An elegant restaurant landing page demonstrating dynamic DOM manipulation and a seamless tab-based navigation system. Built with Webpack to showcase highly modular JavaScript architecture.

title: Weather Forecast Dashboard
description: An interactive multi-day forecast dashboard leveraging the OpenWeatherMap API. Built with Streamlit and Plotly, it visualizes temperature trends through responsive spline charts and dynamic condition grids.

title: Binary Search Tree
description: A robust, from-scratch implementation of a balanced Binary Search Tree using ES6 classes. Features complete node management, multiple traversal algorithms (BFS/DFS), and rigorous Jest test coverage.

title: HashMap
description: A from-scratch implementation of a Hash Map data structure utilizing ES6 Classes. It handles collisions via separate chaining and includes an auto-resizing mechanism based on a specific load factor.

title: Knight's Travails
description: An algorithmic visualizer that calculates the shortest path between two chessboard squares. It implements Breadth-First Search (BFS) and queue-based data structures for optimal pathfinding.

title: Weather Data API
description: A REST API built with Flask for querying historical climate records from the European Climate Assessment & Dataset. It features clean JSON endpoints, auto-converted temperatures, and built-in routing documentation.

title: Tour Event Scraper
description: A continuous web scraping service that monitors websites for new concert events. It utilizes SQLite for robust data deduplication and automatically dispatches SMTP email alerts upon discovering new tours.

title: News Email Automation
description: An automated pipeline that fetches topic-specific articles via the NewsAPI and delivers formatted daily digests directly to users' inboxes using Gmail SMTP over SSL.

title: Batch Invoice Generator
description: A batch-processing automation tool that parses metadata from Excel files to dynamically generate formatted, print-ready PDF invoices using pandas and fpdf2.

title: Archive Manager
description: A lightweight desktop application for compressing and extracting ZIP archives. Built with Python and FreeSimpleGUI, it features native file dialogs and a clean, tabbed interface.

title: Wordle CLI
description: A terminal-based clone of the popular Wordle game. It features color-coded terminal feedback, real-time dictionary validation using pyenchant, and a persistent streak-tracking system.

title: Glassmorphism Sign-Up Form
description: A modern authentication interface built entirely with HTML5 and CSS3. It showcases advanced visual techniques like backdrop filters and utilizes pure CSS pseudo-classes for real-time form validation.

title: Meridian Watches
description: A high-end luxury landing page emphasizing visual hierarchy and fluid CSS Flexbox layouts. Designed with a premium 'Gold & Slate' color palette and elegant typography to simulate a digital boutique experience.

title: Rock Paper Scissors Battle
description: An interactive First-to-Five showdown featuring a modern dark UI and dynamic visual feedback. Powered by Vanilla JavaScript to handle real-time scoring, game state management, and randomized opponent logic.

title: Modern Calculator
description: A fully functional, responsive calculator web application designed with a sleek dark aesthetic. Built with Vanilla JavaScript, it features real-time operation displays, smart error handling for edge cases, and automatic scientific notation formatting for high-precision results.

title: Etch-a-Sketch
description: A modern, browser-based recreation of the classic drawing toy, featuring dynamic DOM-based grid generation. Engineered with Vanilla JavaScript, it includes custom drawing modes, interactive color picking, and full touch support for mobile devices.

title: Web Automation Engine
description: A sophisticated desktop automation tool driving browser interactions via a custom Tkinter GUI. It leverages Selenium with explicit waits and background threading to ensure responsive, non-blocking automation for login, form submission, and file processing tasks.
